title: Translating Signs and Questions
learningGoal: The learner will write sentences using the Te-form to ask for permission (~te mo ii desu ka) and to state strict rules (~te wa ikemasen).
instructions: Write four Japanese sentences based on the English prompts. Focus on whether the prompt is asking a question (permission) or stating a rule (prohibition).

contentItems.text: Remember to use the particle 'wa' (written as は) for prohibitions: 'te wa ikemasen'.

writingPrompt: Translate: 1) May I sit here? 2) You must not take photos. 3) May I use a mobile phone? 4) You must not run.
promptGoal: To construct grammatically accurate sentences differentiating between 'mo ii desu ka' and 'wa ikemasen'.
referenceHints: Sentence 1: [Here] ni [Sit-Te] mo ii desu ka.
Sentence 3: [Mobile phone] wo [Use-Te] mo ii desu ka.

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: ここに すわっても いいですか。しゃしんを とってはいけません。けいたいでんわを つかっても いいですか。はしってはいけません。
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: Koko ni suwatte mo ii desu ka. Shashin wo totte wa ikemasen. Keitai denwa wo tsukatte mo ii desu ka. Hashitte wa ikemasen.
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: May I sit here? You must not take photos. May I use a mobile phone? You must not run.
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Perfect conjugation of four different Group 1 verbs into the Te-form, correctly attaching permission and prohibition suffixes.

evaluationCriteria.description: Did the learner write 'suwatte mo ii desu ka'?
Did the learner write 'totte wa ikemasen'?
Did the learner write 'tsukatte mo ii desu ka'?
Did the learner write 'hashitte wa ikemasen'?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: ここに すわっても いいですか。しゃしんを とってはいけません。けいたいでんわを つかっても いいですか。はしってはいけません。
acceptableAlternates: ここに すわっても いいですか。ここで しゃしんを とってはいけません。けいたいでんわを つかっても いいですか。ここで はしってはいけません。
requiredKeywords: はしってはいけません
adminCorrectAnswerSet.grammarBaseline: Accurate execution of ~te mo ii desu ka and ~te wa ikemasen.

feedbackRules.onPass: Brilliant writing! You correctly applied the complex Te-form rules.
feedbackRules.onFail: Review the conjugation of Group 1 verbs. Torimasu (ri) becomes Totte. Tsukaimasu (i) becomes Tsukatte.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good try! Make sure you didn't confuse 'mo ii desu ka' (permission) with 'wa ikemasen' (must not).

hintText: To ask for permission, end the sentence with a question mark (ka). '...ii desu ka'.
commonMistakes: Writing 'Totte wa ii desu ka' (mixing up the particles). It must be 'Totte MO ii desu ka'.
